title: Kalpa Sutra: The Life of Mahavira (Complete)
description: The complete biography of Mahavira — from his fourteen dreams before birth to his attainment of omniscience to his final liberation.
introduction: The complete biography of Mahavira — from his fourteen dreams before birth to his attainment of omniscience to his final liberation.

translation.text: In that night when the Venerable Ascetic Mahavira was born, there was a divine lustre. The gods came from heaven and performed the birth ceremonies. They anointed him with sacred substances and gave him the name Vardhamana, the Increasing One.
